questions.question: Define binary tree and its properties. Explain the difference between a full binary tree and a complete binary tree. Provide an example for each.
Write a Python function to perform an in-order traversal of a binary tree and return the resulting in-order traversal of the tree as a list. Explain the implementation using a sample binary tree.

A threaded binary tree is a binary tree where each node has at most two children (i.e., left child and right child), and a 'next' pointer is added to each node to point to the in-order successor of the node. Explain how this modification improves the search operation in a threaded binary tree.
